name: Client Operating Model Phase 10 Managed Runtime
outcome_goal: Produce the optional managed runtime, compute accounting, and observability implementation packet.
anti_requirements: Do not conflate discovery/build/proof value with recurring task execution value.

jobs.label: phase_10_managed_runtime_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_10_managed_runtime/PLAN.md. Produce a bounded build packet for Phase 10: Optional Managed Runtime, Compute Accounting, and Observability. Cover managed execution, exported/hybrid alternatives, compute metering, cost visibility, run receipts, heartbeat health, audit views, customer-facing observability, tests, and validation. Do not edit code.
